_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the column-schema-mismatch (branch 5) of the excel-activities/append-range-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (COMException 0x800A03EC from Range.set_Value during append cell-write) → jobs logs (DataTable columns ['EmployeeId', 'HireDate', 'FullName', 'Department'] vs. target sheet header ['FullName', 'EmployeeId', 'Department', 'HireDate'] — Append writes by POSITION, so numeric EmployeeId lands in target's FullName text column, triggering Excel COM cell-write rejection) → workflow source. The column ORDER mismatch between source and target is the smoking gun.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0099999-3333-4444-5555-666677778888 --state Faulted --output json
